name: Apple Foundation Model (on-device, ~3B)
archDisplay: Dense transformer, GQA (24 query / 8 KV heads), 26 layers
note: ~3B on-device model pruned from a 6.4B checkpoint; beat Phi-3-mini/Mistral-7B/Gemma-7B in Apple's 2024 evals, MMLU 61.4.

results.notes: 5-shot, AFM-on-device, from Apple's July 2024 tech report

verificationNotes: Confirmed real and unchanged. arXiv 2407.21075 (HTML) Table 1 confirms AFM-on-device architecture exactly: 26 layers, 24 query/8 KV heads GQA (matches record), and confirms model was pre-trained through stages up to 32768-token context (matches ctxK=32). Total params in the paper are 2.73B (2.58B non-embedding + 0.15B embedding); Apple's own materials describe it as '~3B', consistent with the record's rounded paramsB=3. Confirmed the model is initialized from a pruned 6.4B checkpoint via distillation, and confirmed via multiple secondary sources (Trail of Bits, InfoQ, Medium writeups of the paper) that AFM-on-device beats Phi-3-mini/Mistral-7B/Gemma-7B in Apple's human evals. WWDC keynote date June 10, 2024 confirmed via CNBC/Apple newsroom. MMLU 61.4 (HELM, 5-shot) confirmed literally on the cited arXiv HTML page.
